name: Noodles with Ham and Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the noodles and cook according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. Finely chop the onion and garlic. Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and garlic, sautéing until golden brown.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about 5 minutes until they are tender.
4. Stir in the cooked ham, breaking it into small strips if necessary. Mix well with the mushroom mixture.
5. Combine the noodles with the mushroom and ham mixture. Season with salt, pepper, and a pinch of nutmeg to taste.
6. Prepare the tomato sauce according to package instructions, adding more nutmeg if desired.
7. Serve hot.
